---
title: "Clean files"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)

parse_date_safe <- function(x) {
  x1 <- as.Date(x, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
  x2 <- as.Date(x, format = "%d/%m/%y")
  x3 <- as.Date(x, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
  x4 <- as.Date(x, format = "%Y/%m/%d")
  
  out <- x1
  out[is.na(out)] <- x2[is.na(out)]
  out[is.na(out)] <- x3[is.na(out)]
  out[is.na(out)] <- x4[is.na(out)]
  
  out
}

check_required_columns <- function(df, league_name) {
  required_cols <- c(
    "Date", "HomeTeam", "AwayTeam",
    "FTHG", "FTAG", "FTR",
    "B365H", "B365D", "B365A"
  )
  
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        league_name,
        ": missing required columns: ",
        paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }
}

load_odds_files <- function(folder, prefix) {
  files <- file.path(
    folder,
    c(
      paste0(prefix, " 16-17.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 17-18.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 18-19.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 19-20.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 20-21.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 21-22.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 22-23.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 23-24.csv"),
      paste0(prefix, " 24-25.csv")
    )
  )
  
  missing_files <- files[!file.exists(files)]
  
  if (length(missing_files) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Missing files:\n",
        paste(missing_files, collapse = "\n")
      )
    )
  }
  
  map_dfr(files, function(file) {
    read_csv(
      file,
      col_types = cols(Date = col_character()),
      show_col_types = FALSE
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        season = str_remove(basename(file), "\\.csv$")
      )
  })
}

make_clean_file <- function(folder, prefix, output_file, league_name) {
  raw_df <- load_odds_files(folder, prefix)
  
  check_required_columns(raw_df, league_name)
  
  clean_df <- raw_df %>%
    transmute(
      season = season,
      Date = parse_date_safe(Date),
      HomeTeam = str_trim(HomeTeam),
      AwayTeam = str_trim(AwayTeam),
      FTHG = as.numeric(FTHG),
      FTAG = as.numeric(FTAG),
      FTR = FTR,
      B365H = as.numeric(B365H),
      B365D = as.numeric(B365D),
      B365A = as.numeric(B365A)
    )
  
  if (any(is.na(clean_df$Date))) {
    bad_rows <- clean_df %>%
      filter(is.na(Date))
    
    cat("\n", league_name, ": rows with unparsed dates:\n", sep = "")
    print(bad_rows)
    stop(paste0(league_name, ": some dates could not be parsed."))
  }
  
  saveRDS(clean_df, output_file)
  
  cat("\nSaved ", output_file, " successfully.\n", sep = "")
  cat("Rows: ", nrow(clean_df), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("Seasons: ", paste(sort(unique(clean_df$season)), collapse = ", "), "\n", sep = "")
}
```

Create all 4 clean files
```{r}
make_clean_file(
  folder = "PL",
  prefix = "PL",
  output_file = "pl_clean.rds",
  league_name = "Premier League"
)

make_clean_file(
  folder = "LL",
  prefix = "LL",
  output_file = "ll_clean.rds",
  league_name = "La Liga"
)

make_clean_file(
  folder = "SA",
  prefix = "SA",
  output_file = "sa_clean.rds",
  league_name = "Serie A"
)

make_clean_file(
  folder = "BL",
  prefix = "BL",
  output_file = "bl_clean.rds",
  league_name = "Bundesliga"
)
```
Checks for each league
```{r}
pl <- readRDS("pl_clean.rds")
ll <- readRDS("ll_clean.rds")
sa <- readRDS("sa_clean.rds")
bl <- readRDS("bl_clean.rds")

names(pl)
names(ll)
names(sa)
names(bl)

nrow(pl)
nrow(ll)
nrow(sa)
nrow(bl)
```
